title: Vietnam Music Festival 2026
description: An epic outdoor music festival featuring Vietnam's top artists and international performers. Experience 3 days of non-stop music across 4 stages with genres ranging from pop, indie, electronic, and traditional Vietnamese music. Food stalls, art installations, and camping options available.

title: Hanoi Jazz Night
description: A sophisticated jazz evening at the Hanoi Opera House featuring legendary jazz musicians from Vietnam and Southeast Asia. Enjoy classic jazz standards alongside contemporary fusion pieces in a stunning heritage venue.

title: Rock Storm Concert
description: Vietnam's biggest rock music event returns with an explosive lineup of local and international rock bands. Expect high-energy performances, pyrotechnics, and an unforgettable night of rock music.

title: Saigon Electronic Music Festival
description: A premier electronic music event in Ho Chi Minh City featuring world-class DJs and cutting-edge sound systems. Dance music genres include house, techno, trance, and drum & bass across multiple stages.

title: Da Nang Beach Music Party
description: A beachfront music celebration combining sea, sand, and sensational music. Featuring acoustic sets, pop performances, and sunset DJ sets on the beautiful My Khe Beach.

title: Vietnam Premier League Football Final
description: Witness the most exciting football final of the Vietnamese Premier League season. Two top clubs battle it out for the championship title in front of a packed stadium atmosphere.

title: Ho Chi Minh City Marathon 2026
description: The annual HCMC Marathon attracts thousands of runners from across Vietnam and internationally. Categories include full marathon, half marathon, 10km, and 5km fun run. All fitness levels welcome.

title: Badminton Championship Da Nang
description: Regional badminton championship featuring amateur and semi-professional players competing across multiple age categories and skill levels. Spectators welcome.

title: Yoga & Wellness Retreat Hoi An
description: A transformative 2-day yoga and wellness retreat in the historic town of Hoi An. Sessions include morning yoga, meditation, breathwork, nutrition workshops, and evening sound healing ceremonies.

title: Tech Summit Vietnam 2026
description: Vietnam's premier technology conference bringing together 2000+ tech leaders, developers, and innovators. Sessions cover AI, machine learning, blockchain, cloud computing, cybersecurity, and startup ecosystem.

title: Python & AI Workshop Saigon
description: A hands-on full-day workshop covering Python for data science and AI applications. Topics include NumPy, Pandas, Scikit-learn, neural networks basics, and deploying ML models. Bring your laptop.

title: Mobile App Development Bootcamp
description: A 3-day intensive bootcamp for aspiring mobile developers. Learn React Native from scratch and build your first cross-platform mobile app. Beginner friendly with experienced mentors.

title: Cybersecurity Conference Hanoi
description: Annual cybersecurity summit focusing on emerging threats, data protection, ethical hacking, and enterprise security strategies. Featuring CTF competition and live hacking demonstrations.

title: Saigon Food Festival 2026
description: A 4-day celebration of Vietnamese and international cuisine featuring over 200 food stalls, cooking demonstrations by celebrity chefs, food competitions, and cultural performances.

title: Wine & Spirits Tasting Evening
description: An elegant wine and spirits tasting event featuring premium selections from France, Italy, Spain, and the New World. Expert sommeliers guide you through each tasting with food pairings.

title: Street Food Night Market
description: A vibrant night market showcasing the best of Vietnamese street food alongside international favorites. Over 50 vendors, live cooking shows, and traditional music performances.

title: Contemporary Art Exhibition
description: A major contemporary art exhibition featuring 60+ works from emerging and established Vietnamese and Southeast Asian artists. Mixed media installations, paintings, sculptures, and digital art.

title: Traditional Water Puppet Show
description: Experience the ancient Vietnamese art of water puppetry at the iconic Thang Long Water Puppet Theatre. A UNESCO-recognized cultural heritage performance not to be missed.

title: Photography Workshop Da Nang
description: Learn photography from professional photographers in the scenic city of Da Nang. Covers composition, lighting, street photography, landscape, and photo editing. All camera levels welcome.
venue: Da Nang Museum of Cham Sculpture

title: Vietnam Startup Summit 2026
description: Connect with Vietnam's most innovative startups, venture capitalists, and industry leaders. Featuring pitch competitions, panel discussions, networking sessions, and exclusive deal-making opportunities.
venue: Gem Center Ho Chi Minh City

title: Digital Marketing Masterclass
description: A comprehensive digital marketing masterclass covering SEO, social media strategy, content marketing, paid advertising, email marketing, and analytics. Taught by industry practitioners.

title: English Communication Skills Workshop
description: Build confidence in professional English communication. Topics include business presentation skills, negotiation language, email writing, and public speaking techniques.
venue: British Council Ho Chi Minh City

title: Data Science with Python Beginner Course
description: A beginner-friendly introduction to data science using Python. Learn data manipulation with Pandas, data visualization with Matplotlib, and basic machine learning with Scikit-learn.

title: Stand-Up Comedy Night Saigon
description: An evening of laughter featuring Vietnam's funniest stand-up comedians performing original material in both Vietnamese and English. Great night out for all ages.

title: Gaming Tournament Ho Chi Minh City
description: A massive gaming tournament featuring League of Legends, Valorant, and FIFA competitions. Open registration for all skill levels with prize pool worth 50 million VND. Casual gaming zone also available.

title: Fansipan Hiking Adventure
description: Join an organized group hike to the summit of Fansipan - the Roof of Indochina. Experienced guides with safety equipment provided and accommodation at mountain lodge. Moderate to challenging fitness required.

title: Mekong Delta Day Tour
description: Explore the breathtaking Mekong Delta on a guided day tour. Visit floating markets and traditional villages. Sample local cuisine and travel by boat through scenic waterways. Perfect for nature lovers.

title: Ba Na Hills Cable Car & Theme Park
description: Experience the world-famous Golden Bridge and Fantasy Park at Ba Na Hills. Cable car ride included with access to amusement rides, French Village, and panoramic mountain views.
venue: Ba Na Hills Cable Car Station

title: Fitness & CrossFit Challenge
description: A high-intensity fitness competition open to all levels. Workouts designed by certified CrossFit coaches. Includes individual and team events. Post-event protein buffet and awards ceremony.
venue: Fit24 Gym Ho Chi Minh City

title: Mental Health Awareness Seminar
description: An important seminar on mental health in the modern workplace. Topics include stress management and burnout prevention, building resilience, and creating supportive work environments.
